description_long: This is a polygonal, cylindrical trash bin with a faceted, slightly tapered body and a wide, octagonal lid. The lid appears to be removable and features a small, raised rectangular handle at the center. The body of the bin is primarily a light gray color, with a distinct black band running just below the lid, suggesting a separation between the lid and the main container. On two opposing sides, there are rectangular, slightly protruding panels that may serve as handles or reinforcements. The surface texture is matte and slightly rough, resembling galvanized metal or concrete. There are no visible wheels, signage, or recycling symbols on the exterior.
description: A faceted, gray cylindrical trash bin with a removable octagonal lid and small central handle, featuring a matte, slightly rough surface and no visible signage.
description_view_0: Front view shows the plain, faceted body and the octagonal lid with a central handle, no visible handles or panels.
description_view_1: Side view reveals a rectangular protruding panel, likely a handle or reinforcement, beneath the lid.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, with a plain body and lid, lacking any protruding features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows another rectangular panel similar to view 1, indicating symmetry.
